title: 2x2 block pack
description:
A texture pack for blocks with 2x2 wide textures (4 pixels).
Mostly for 1.20.4 you can test other versions near it

(the image is a texture from the pack btw)

dm too_smooth_ in discord if the invite link dosent work or have expired to get a invite
body: 2x2 block texture pack (4 pixels) produces less lag BUT dosent cover every texture...
